2603.19166.title: Meanings and Measurements: Multi-Agent Probabilistic Grounding for Vision-Language Navigation
2603.19166.paper_summary: Robots collaborating with humans must convert natural language goals into actionable, physically grounded decisions. For example, executing a command such as "go two meters to the right of the fridge" requires grounding semantic references, spatial relations, and metric constraints within a 3D scene. While recent vision language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong semantic grounding capabilities, they are not explicitly designed to reason about metric constraints in physically defined spaces. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that state-of-the-art VLM-based grounding approaches struggle with complex metric-semantic language queries. To address this limitation, we propose MAPG (Multi-Agent Probabilistic Grounding), an agentic framework that decomposes language queries into structured subcomponents and queries a VLM to ground each component. MAPG then probabilistically composes these grounded outputs to produce metrically consistent, actionable decisions in 3D space. We evaluate MAPG on the HM-EQA benchmark and show consistent performance improvements over strong baselines. Furthermore, we introduce a new benchmark, MAPG-Bench, specifically designed to evaluate metric-semantic goal grounding, addressing a gap in existing language grounding evaluations. We also present a real-world robot demonstration showing that MAPG transfers beyond simulation when a structured scene representation is available.
2603.19166.paper_summary_zh: 機器人與人類合作必須將自然語言目標轉換為可執行的、具體的決策。<lb/>例如，執行一個命令，如「向冰箱的右邊移動兩米」，需要在三維場景中對語義參考、空間關係和度量限制進行具體化。<lb/>雖然最近的視覺語言模型（VLMs）展示了強大的語義具體化能力，但它們並不是專門設計用來推理物理定義空間中的度量限制。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們實證展示了最先進的基於VLM的具體化方法在處理複雜的度量-語義語言查詢時存在困難。<lb/>為了解決這一限制，我們提出了MAPG（多代理概率具體化），這是一個代理框架，將語言查詢分解為結構化的子組件，並查詢VLM以具體化每個組件。<lb/>然後，MAPG以概率方式組合這些具體化的輸出，以在三維空間中產生度量一致的可執行決策。<lb/>我們在HM-EQA基準上評估MAPG，並顯示出相對於強基準的一致性能提升。<lb/>此外，我們還介紹了一個新的基準，MAPG-Bench，專門設計用來評估度量-語義目標具體化，填補了現有語言具體化評估中的空白。<lb/>我們還展示了一個現實世界的機器人演示，顯示當有結構化場景表示可用時，MAPG能夠超越模擬進行轉移。
2603.19166.author: Swagat Padhan et.al.
2603.19166.authors: Swagat Padhan, Lakshya Jain, Bhavya Minesh Shah, Omkar Patil, Thao Nguyen, Nakul Gopalan
